item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "root='/Users/za/Documents/PROMPTER/longhorizon-work/scenario-06'
printf 'SEARCH_ROOT=%s\\n' \""'$root"
printf '"'ABANDONED_VALUES\\n'

canary_rc=$?
printf '"'canary_search_exit=%s\\n' \""'$canary_rc"
exit 0'
